calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Matthew Kabak, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Thomas Joseph and for plaintiff Holly Joseph, who was not present at today's hearing. Plaintiff Thomas Joseph was placed under oath and examined.
Kathy Chan, Property Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendants David Replogle or Alex Nguyen.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 24, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant David Replogle on March 23, 2009.

Plaintiffs introduced the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Residential Lease or Month-To-Month Rental Agreement---------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Proof of Service of the Three-Day Notice to Pay
or Quit as to Defendant Alex Nguyen--------------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Proof of Service of the Three-Day Notice to Pay
or Quit as to Defendant David Replogle-----------------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Thomas Joseph and Holly Joseph, and against defendants David Replogle and Alex Nguyen as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $22,333.48.
Attorney Fees - $6,000.00.
Costs - $1,509.42.
Total - $29,842.90.

Additionally, plaintiffs Thomas Joseph and Holly Joseph are entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 301 Main Stret, Unit 6G, San Francisco, CA 94105. The lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2009 Off Calendar
